tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within or close to normal limits except for a mildly elevated chloride and low HDL cholesterol. The low HDL may increase cardiovascular risk, especially in an elderly male. Renal function, glycemic control, and other electrolytes are normal. No acute abnormalities detected; recommend monitoring lipid profile and considering cardiovascular risk management.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
